improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade decisions. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for professionals."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI for business owners and traders. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating what Gideon offers and the free trial hook. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the site is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and messaging apps—critical for a B2B audience that discovers tools through professional networks.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI Trade & Business Partner, Powered by Claude"

Subheading: "Get instant, expert answers for trade and operations. Try Gideon free—no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and its domain (trade & business), while leveraging Claude's credibility. The subheading addresses the core value prop (instant expert answers), specifies the use case (trade and operations), and removes friction by highlighting the free trial with no payment commitment. This builds trust and encourages immediate action.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be prompted to choose a membership plan to continue. Membership starts from just US$2 per day and unlocks unlimited access to Gideon, including voice chat and your personal members workspace. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. It reassures prospects by clearly explaining what to expect, reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), and nudges toward annual billing for better retention. Reducing uncertainty at this stage helps convert trial users into paying members.
